data.title: [validate.sh]: Invoking test-batched.sh with pending/interrupted state -> exits 1 instead of exit 2 and omits ACTION REQUIRED structured block
data.description:
## Expected Behavior
When test-batched.sh exits 0 but emits the ACTION REQUIRED structured block (tests incomplete/interrupted), validate.sh should detect the block, exit with code 2, and propagate the ACTION REQUIRED message.

## Actual Behavior
test_validate_emits_action_required_block_on_exit_2 fails with:
  expected exit: 2, actual: 1
  expected 'ACTION REQUIRED' in output: not present

validate.sh exits 1 (generic error) instead of 2 (pending-action), and the ACTION REQUIRED block is not forwarded to its output.

## Fix
validate.sh must parse test-batched.sh output for the ACTION REQUIRED block sentinel, propagate it to stdout, and exit 2 when detected.
